item.title: Tulsi Gabbard to testify at Senate Intelligence Committee amid election probe concerns
item.description: Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard has said she was at a Georgia election center during an FBI raid at the direction of President Trump.

item.title: Housing affordability package set to advance in Congress amid home-cost concerns
item.description: Wide-ranging legislation would reduce regulations for homebuilders while giving local governments incentives to streamline the building process.

item.title: Cuba says international airlines can no longer refuel there as Trump turns up the pressure
item.description: The update comes shortly after President Donald Trump threatened tariffs on any country that supplies Cuba with oil.

item.title: Epstein files: White House rejects calls for Lutnick resignation after lawmaker demands
item.description: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick previously said on a podcast he had cut ties with notorious sex offender Jeffrey Epstein since an initial 2005 encou...

item.title: Federal judge orders Fulton County Georgia election case documents unsealed by Tuesday
item.description: The FBI last month raided an election facility central to President Donald Trump's debunked claims of fraud in the 2020 election.
